source.title: Temu Global App Downloads and MAU Data (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: Temu cumulative global downloads crossed 1 billion in Q2 2025 (+93% YoY). Peak US downloads: 12.4M/month (Jan 2024), declining to 7.6M/month (Aug 2024)
extractions.evidence: Temu's cumulative global downloads cracked the 1 billion mark in Q2 2025, a 93% increase YoY. US downloads peaked at 12.4M in January 2024, declined to 7.6M by August 2024.

verification.verifier_notes: From Sensor Tower and Statista data. US download trajectory was declining even before tariff shock.

extractions.claim: Temu later surpassed 530M global MAU after 48% YoY surge, making it one of the largest e-commerce apps globally
extractions.evidence: By later in 2025, Temu surpassed 530 million MAUs after a 48% year-over-year surge.

verification.verifier_notes: 530M MAU figure from industry trackers. For context: Amazon has ~310M MAU globally.

extractions.claim: Post-tariff recovery: Temu resumed US ad spending (1,100 Meta ads, 700 Google ads) and jumped back in App Store rankings by mid-2025
extractions.evidence: Temu quietly resumed advertising, running 1,100 active Meta ads and 700 active Google ads in the U.S., up from as few as 4 and 6 respectively in mid-April 2025. Temu jumped in App Store rankings as ad spend rebounded.

verification.verifier_notes: From Modern Retail. Shows Temu's US strategy is resilient — cut spend during tariff shock, resumed when viable.
